Based on the provided resume:

**Question 1: How many years of work experience do you have with Full-Stack Development?**  
The candidate has approximately 3 years of direct full-stack development experience, demonstrated by roles at StartupXYZ (2019-2021) and the personal E-commerce Platform project (2020), which involved both backend (Python/Django) and frontend (React) work.

**Question 2: How many years of work experience do you have with Spring Boot?**  
The resume does not list any experience with Spring Boot. The candidate's backend expertise is primarily in Python frameworks (Django, Flask), not the Java/Spring ecosystem.

**Question 3: How many years of work experience do you have with React.js?**  
The candidate has approximately 3 years of experience with React.js, starting with frontend component development in the Junior Developer role (2018-2019) and including its use in the full-stack E-commerce Platform project (2020).
